name: Spiced Percolator Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. In a party-size coffee pot (24-30 cups), combine the 9 cups of unsweetened pineapple juice, 9 cups cranberry juice cocktail, 4.5 cups water, and 1 cup of brown sugar.
2. Place the cloves, cinnamon sticks, and salt in the coffee basket.
3. Assemble, plug in, and perk the pot until all the liquid has been drawn through once.
4. Serve piping hot. Makes approximately 22 servings.
